name: API Key Rotation Enforcement
description: Enforces API key rotation policies by scanning for keys that exceed the maximum age threshold. Checks key age against policy, auto-rotates keys for supported integrations, alerts key owners for manual rotation when auto-rotation is unavailable, and creates tracking tickets for keys approaching expiration.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: AWS
required_integrations.reason: Rotate AWS IAM access keys and query key metadata

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create tracking tickets for API key rotation tasks

data.title: API Key Rotation Check
data.summary: Fires on schedule or API key expiry alert to check key ages

config.description: Weekly Monday 7 AM API key age scan

data.title: Scan API Key Ages
data.summary: Query all API keys and calculate age against 90-day rotation policy

config.code:
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
max_age_days = 90
now = datetime.utcnow()
keys = context.get('api_keys', [])
expired = [k for k in keys if (now - datetime.fromisoformat(k.get('created_date', now.isoformat()))).days > max_age_days]
approaching = [k for k in keys if 75 < (now - datetime.fromisoformat(k.get('created_date', now.isoformat()))).days <= max_age_days]
result = {'expired_keys': expired, 'approaching_expiry': approaching, 'expired_count': len(expired), 'approaching_count': len(approaching)}

data.title: Expired Keys Found?
data.summary: Branch if any API keys exceed the maximum age threshold

data.title: Loop Over Expired Keys
data.summary: Iterate over each expired API key for rotation

data.title: Auto-Rotation Supported?
data.summary: Check if the key's service supports automatic rotation

data.title: Auto-Rotate Key
data.summary: Automatically rotate the expired API key

params.reason: API key exceeded 90-day rotation policy — auto-rotated

data.title: Alert Key Owner
data.summary: Notify the key owner to manually rotate their expired API key

config.email_subject: Action Required: API Key Rotation Overdue — {{$.loop.key.service_name}}
config.message: Your API key for {{$.loop.key.service_name}} (ID: {{$.loop.key.key_id}}) has exceeded the 90-day rotation policy. Auto-rotation is not available for this service. Please rotate the key manually within 48 hours.

data.title: Log Clean Scan
data.summary: Log that no expired API keys were found this cycle

config.note: Weekly API key rotation scan completed. No expired keys found. All keys within 90-day rotation policy.

config.summary: API key rotation enforcement cycle completed
